daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. Mercury's whispering that it's time to stop overthinking and just *do* the thing. Trust your gut—it's been right before and it's not starting to lie today.
daily.love: There's a softness in the air around your connections. Whether you're single or coupled up, today invites you to be vulnerable in that real way. Show up authentically and watch how people respond.
daily.career: Your creative energy is *chef's kiss* today. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take that project in a bold new direction. The universe is backing your confidence.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentle movement—maybe a walk, some stretching, whatever feels good. You're carrying less tension than usual, so vibe with that lightness and keep the momentum flowing.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about recalibrating your priorities. Mercury's vibes are inviting you to slow down and actually listen to what your gut's been trying to tell you. Trust the process, even when things feel unclear.
weekly.love: Your people are noticing the shift in your energy. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your superpower right now. Someone's about to appreciate you for exactly who you are without the performance.
weekly.career: Creative solutions are flowing, but don't force them. The universe is hinting that collaboration over solo grinding will hit different this week. Your ideas matter—share them, but stay flexible on how they actually unfold.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler movement and actual rest, not just productivity. This is the week to try that thing you've been curious about—yoga, walks, whatever makes your nervous system feel safe. Listen to those signals.
